inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description:
Accessible label for screen readers.
Used in the screen-reader-only span element to provide context for assistive technologies.

inputs.name: ariaRoleDescription
inputs.description: Aria role description for the object status.

inputs.name: clickable
inputs.description: Whether the Object Status is clickable.

inputs.name: glyphAriaLabel
inputs.description: Label applied to glyph element, should be used when there is no text included

inputs.name: indicationColor
inputs.description:
A number representing the indication color.
For non-inverted state available numbers are from 1 to 8.
For inverted state available numbers are from 1 to 10.

inputs.name: inverted
inputs.description: Whether the Object Status is inverted.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Define the text content of the Object Status

inputs.name: large
inputs.description: Whether the Object Status is in Large Design.

inputs.name: secondaryIndication
inputs.description: Whether to use secondary set of indication colors.

inputs.name: status
inputs.description:
The status represented by the Object Status.
Can be one of the following: 'negative' | 'critical' | 'positive' | 'informative'
For default Object Status omit this property

inputs.name: statusMessage
inputs.description: An optional status message for the Object Status.

inputs.name: textTemplate
inputs.description: Template reference for complex object status texts.
